dashboard_widgets_sub: The most important numbers at a glance
dashboard_analytics_locked_sub: Premium unlocks deeper analytics by week, month, and category
dashboard_widget_empty_body: Once expenses appear, category share and growth will show up here.
dashboard_widget_unlock_body: Premium reveals income and expense percentage changes, category share, and spending momentum.
dashboard_premium_sub: Money status, risks, and forecasts in one place
dashboard_premium_locked_sub: Premium unlocks balance forecasts, risk radar, and decision-ready insights
dashboard_premium_locked_body: Balance forecasts, safe-to-spend guidance, limit risks, and a financial health score are available for Premium users.
dashboard_premium_safe_sub: Today's safe allowance from plan and forecast
dashboard_premium_no_income_sub: No income has been added this month
dashboard_premium_no_income_body: The savings rate will appear once income transactions are added.
dashboard_premium_health_summary_strong: Cash flow is under control and risks are low.
dashboard_premium_health_summary_ok: Overall health is solid, but there are a few warning signs.
dashboard_premium_health_summary_risk: Core indicators are under pressure. Review your plan and spending pace.
dashboard_premium_limits_sub: Most risky active limits are shown first
dashboard_premium_limits_empty_body: Once category limits are added, their risk level will appear here.
dashboard_premium_top_categories_sub: Where most of your money is going this month
dashboard_premium_top_categories_empty_b: Your largest categories will appear once this month's expenses arrive.
dashboard_premium_debts_empty_body: When debt records are added, the next due item and risk signals will appear here.
dashboard_premium_debts_ok_body: The next due item is tracked and there are no overdue debts.
dashboard_premium_trend_sub: Daily rhythm of income and spending
dashboard_premium_trend_empty_body: The chart will appear after transactions are recorded over the last 7 days.
dashboard_premium_transactions_empty_bod: Your largest income and expense entries will appear here once transactions are added.
dashboard_premium_alerts_empty_body: Spending is within the normal range. We'll flag unusual jumps here.
dashboard_premium_plans_sub: Watch goals that are near completion or at risk
dashboard_premium_plans_empty_body: Progress will appear here once goals and limits are added.
dashboard_premium_recurring_empty_body: If the same expense repeats over multiple months, it will appear here.
stg_clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all data?
confirm_delete_sub: This operation will be removed from database
privacy_text:
Kassa app protects the personal data of its users.

1. We only collect data necessary for the app to function (Telegram ID, transaction data).
2. Your data is stored encrypted and is not shared with third parties.
3. You can delete all your data at any time.
4. We do not use cookies or tracking technologies.
5. Data is securely stored on Supabase servers.

For questions, contact @uyqur_nurali.
terms_text:
Kassa is a personal financial management application.

1. The app is intended for personal use only.
2. The user is responsible for the accuracy of their data.
3. We do not guarantee uninterrupted operation, but strive for the best experience.
4. The app is free, but premium features may be added in the future.
5. We may change terms at any time.

For questions, contact @uyqur_nurali.
profile_photo_removed: Profile photo will be removed after saving
profile_photo_hint: The photo will appear on the dashboard and in settings
guide_html:
Kassa is a personal finance management app.

📌 Add income or expense: Tap the "+" button below, choose the type, select a category, and enter the amount.

📊 Reports: View charts and trends on the home screen. Use the date filter to focus on a specific period.

📱 Telegram bot: Send a message to the bot, for example: "500000 food expense" — the transaction will be saved automatically.

🔐 Security: Protect the app with a PIN code and Face ID / Touch ID.

📤 Export: Save data as JSON or generate a PDF report.
err_missing_user_id: Telegram user_id was not found. Add ?user_id=123 to the URL.
err_biometric_unavailable: Biometrics are not available on this device
err_biometric_update_failed: Could not update biometric status. Please try again.
err_pdf_lib_missing: The PDF module is not loaded!
confirm_reset_data: WARNING! All transactions will be deleted. Continue?
pdf_modal_hint: The PDF report is generated in Unicode format, so Cyrillic text is displayed correctly.
debts_sub: See who owes you and whom you owe in one place.
debts_receivable_sub: Amount that should come back to you
debts_empty_sub: In the next phase we will connect add, repay and reminder flows here.
plan_sub: Prepare spending targets in advance and connect them with category limits.
plan_step_budget_sub: Set how much can be spent for each category by month end.
plan_step_alert_sub: Get mini app and bot warnings before the limit is exhausted.
plan_step_ai_sub: Receive recommendations for future spending based on categories and habits.
plan_empty_sub: In the next phase we will fill this section with category limits and AI suggestions.
subscription_syncing_hint: Plan details will appear automatically after the database is updated.
subscription_free_hint: The free plan includes core features and basic limits.
pricing_free_copy: A starter plan for essential financial control.
pricing_premium_copy: For unlimited limits, advanced reminders, and premium reports.
pricing_feature_basic_sync: Core bot and mini app sync
pricing_free_current: Your free plan is already active.
paywall_limit_title: You have reached the free plan limit
paywall_plan_body: The free plan allows only 1 active plan and limit. Premium unlocks unlimited plans, debts, limits, and advanced reports.
paywall_debt_body: The free plan stores only 1 active debt. Premium unlocks unlimited debts, plans, limits, and better reminders.
paywall_custom_reminder_title: Custom reminder time is available in Premium
paywall_custom_reminder_body: The free plan includes only the basic reminder. With Premium you can set any custom reminder date and time.
paywall_reports_title: PDF reports are available in Premium
paywall_reports_body: Premium lets you download advanced reports in PDF and Excel formats.
paywall_reminders_title: Daily reminders are available in Premium
paywall_reminders_body: Premium users receive morning and evening reminders. The free plan keeps only the basic reminder.
paywall_analytics_title: Advanced analytics are available in Premium
paywall_analytics_body: Premium unlocks deep statistics, advanced analytics, and AI-ready conveniences.
paywall_generic_body: This feature is available on Premium. Upgrade to unlock more features and higher limits.
